message.content:
### Pre-Launch Checklist for New Marketing Website (WordPress or Similar)

#### Technical Checks
- **Domain & Hosting**: Verify domain registration (renewal date >1yr), DNS propagation (A/CNAME/MX records), SSL certificate installed & valid (HTTPS redirect enforced).
- **Platform Setup**: Install/update WordPress/core plugins/themes; enable auto-updates; configure wp-config.php (security keys, debug=false in production).
- **Performance**: Minify CSS/JS/images; enable caching (e.g., WP Super Cache); optimize database (WP-Optimize); test Core Web Vitals (LCP<2.5s, FID<100ms, CLS<0.1); compress images <100KB.
- **Security**: Install security plugin (Wordfence/iThemes); harden wp-config (disable file editing); set strong admin passwords; limit login attempts; firewall enabled; scan for vulnerabilities.
- **Functionality**: Test all pages/forms/plugins (contact, newsletter signup); responsive design (mobile/desktop); cross-browser compatibility (Chrome/Firefox/Safari/Edge); error pages (404/500) customized.
- **Backups**: Set automated daily backups (UpdraftPlus); test restore; offsite storage (Google Drive/Dropbox).
- **Analytics/Tracking**: Integrate Google Analytics 4/Tag Manager; verify console setup; add heatmaps (Hotjar optional).

#### SEO Checks
- **On-Page**: Title tags <60 chars unique; meta descriptions <160 chars compelling; H1-H6 hierarchy; alt text on all images; schema markup (JSON-LD for site/organization).
- **Technical SEO**: XML sitemap submitted to Google/Bing Search Console; robots.txt configured (noindex staging); canonical tags; clean URLs (no /?p=123); hreflang for multilingual.
- **Content Optimization**: Keyword research integrated (primary/secondary/LSI); internal linking; page speed >90 Google PageSpeed; mobile-first indexing confirmed.
- **Off-Page Prep**: Set up Google Search Console/Bing Webmaster; submit sitemap; monitor index status; disavow bad links if needed.
- **Local SEO (if applicable)**: Google Business Profile linked; NAP consistency.

#### Legal & Compliance Checks
- **Privacy**: GDPR/CCPA compliant privacy policy page; cookie consent banner (CookieYes); data processing agreements for plugins (Mailchimp).
- **Terms & Disclosures**: Terms of Service/Use page; disclaimers for marketing claims; copyright footer; affiliate disclosures if applicable.
- **Accessibility**: WCAG 2.1 AA (alt texts, keyboard nav, color contrast >4.5:1); ARIA labels; test with WAVE tool.
- **Intellectual Property**: All images/content licensed/original; no trademark infringement; favicon/branding cleared.
- **Other**: Age gates if needed; CAN-SPAM compliance for forms; ADA notice.

#### Content Checks
- **Quality & Proofing**: Grammar/spelling checked (Grammarly); consistent tone/branding; CTAs on every page; compelling headlines.
- **Optimization**: Content skimmable (short paras, bullets); above-fold value; A/B test variants ready.
- **Multimedia**: Videos optimized (lazy load); infographics credited; social share images (1200x630px).
- **Final Review**: User journey tested (homepage → services → contact); broken links fixed (Screaming Frog); duplicate content removed.

**Launch Steps**:
- Switch to production DNS/SSL.
- Monitor first 24hrs (uptime via UptimeRobot; error logs).
- Announce via email/social; track initial traffic.

*Note: This checklist is exhaustive for most sites but adapt for custom needs like e-commerce. Double-check platform-specific docs (e.g., WordPress Codex).*
